about - Konsole

root@host:~$

cat me.txt|

Hello, I am Andres from the planet earth. I like to learn new things related to technologies all the time. I have multiple interests, some of these are programming with Ruby, Python and now Rust, APIs, cybersecurity, systems GNU/Linux.

I entered to the computer world when I was 15 years old and I installed my first Ubuntu distro on my personal laptop. Then, a few years later, I studied a Bachelor’s Degree in computer programming. Currently, I am working on personals projects, studying and working like freelancer.

And I am not only 1s and 0s, I like to ride road bikes 🚴, take pictures 📷, watch movies 🎥, eat pizza 🍕, sometimes drink beer 🍺, travel 🏕️ and to be in the nature 🌳.

root@host:~$ |
